macro.title: 3 quick takes on Kevin Warsh’s first Fed meeting
macro.what: Kevin Warsh called policy uneven for housing, ended dot plot guidance and launched a Fed task force as the 10-year yield sits near 4.50%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Likely to Stay High For Now as Markets Digest Warsh’s First Fed Meeting

macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Double-take double jeopardy: Housing surnames for $100
macro.what: Housing readers see Clayton and Pulte in DC headlines and assume builder deals, even when stories are unrelated to housing companies.
macro.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
macro.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

macro.title: Warsh era at the Fed begins with rate pause amid spiking inflation
macro.what: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday left its benchmark interest rate unchanged at a target range of 3.5% to 3.75%, marking its fourth consecutive pause as it enters the Kevin Warsh er

housing.title: The 10 best real estate marketing companies to boost your business in 2026

housing.title: PNC Bank closes $251.4 million affordable housing fund
housing.what: PNC Bank closed a $251.4M LIHTC fund to back 16 properties and more than 1,700 affordable rentals nationwide
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.what: Nationwide, 13.6% of the homebuying deals made in May fell through
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Florida Dominates May’s Most Expensive Home Sales, Led by a $75 Million Boca Raton Deal
housing.what: A Boca Raton mansion within a private golf course community and two apartments in New York City are among May’s most expensive home sales

housing.title: SpaceX Employees Could Buy 2 in 5 San Antonio Homes With Their IPO Windfall
housing.what: The massive IPO would create enough wealth for SpaceX employees to buy roughly 40% of all the homes in San Antonio, one of the closest major metros to where the company is headquartered
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
